title: humboltia quadrifida
intro: Humboltia quadrifida, also known as the four-angled gourd or bitter apple, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Humboltia quadrifida include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Humboltia quadrifida can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat a range of health issues.
